entries.speaker: renn
lines:
Sable. You look like you've been sleeping on rooftops
again.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Rooftops are fine. It's the ground that's the problem.

entries.speaker: renn
lines:
Half my regulars are dead or gone. The other half drink
twice as much. Business has never been worse and never been
better.

entries.speaker: renn
lines: You're not here for a drink.

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
I need to find them. All of them. Edren, Lira, Torren,
Maren.

entries.speaker: renn
lines:
That's four people scattered across a continent that's
falling apart. Even for you, that's ambitious.

entries.speaker: renn
lines:
Edren's at Highcairn. The monastery in the highlands.
Cordwyn got word from a rider three days ago — he's alive but
he's not talking.

entries.speaker: renn
lines:
Lira went back to the Compact. Infiltrated under a
false name. Last I heard, she was in Corrund chasing something
through the Consortium's archives. That was two weeks ago.

entries.speaker: renn
lines:
Back in the Wilds. The spirit-speakers are saying the
whole forest is dying. Torren's trying to hold it together.

entries.speaker: renn
lines:
Gone. Left a note at Cordwyn's office: "I've gone to
find what came before the Pendulum." Nobody knows where that
means.

entries.speaker: renn
lines:
Start with whoever you can reach. Come back when you
have news. I'll keep my ears open.

entries.speaker: renn
lines: Come back alive. That's the price.
